samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>Implement a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit signed or unsigned integers. and the inputs are two 8-bit operands. The module accepts a dividend and a divisor as inputs and provides a 16-bit result containing both the quotient and the remainder. The design supports both signed and unsigned division operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">1-bit indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input signal representing the dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input signal representing the divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">1-bit indicates that a valid operation request is present.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">1-bit indicates that the 16-bit output result has already been acknowledged.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">1-bit output signal indicating the result is valid and ready.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit the output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="DIVIDE_BY_ZERO">Error state for divide-by-zero condition.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>Use a sequential approach to implement the division operation.</implementation>
    <task id="signed_division">
        <description>Perform signed division.</description>
        <input id="dividend_signed" width_description="[7:0]">Signed dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor_signed" width_description="[7:0]">Signed divisor.</input>
        <output id="quotient" width_description="[7:0]">Quotient of the division.</output>
        <output id="remainder" width_description="[7:0]">Remainder of the division.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="unsigned_division">
        <description>Perform unsigned division.</description>
        <input id="dividend_unsigned" width_description="[7:0]">Unsigned dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor_unsigned" width_description="[7:0]">Unsigned divisor.</input>
        <output id="quotient" width_description="[7:0]">Quotient of the division.</output>
        <output id="remainder" width_description="[7:0]">Remainder of the division.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="division_operation">
        <description>Handle division operation based on the sign.</description>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">Dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">Divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="sign">Sign indicator.</input>
        <output id="quotient" width_description="[7:0]">Quotient of the division.</output>
        <output id="remainder" width_description="[7:0]">Remainder of the division.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="shift_register_update">
        <description>Update the shift register based on the subtraction result.</description>
        <input id="sr" width_description="[15:0]">Shift register.</input>
        <input id="sub_result" width_description="[15:0]">Subtraction result.</input>
        <output id="new_sr" width_description="[15:0]">Updated shift register.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="mux_select">
        <description>Select the appropriate result based on the carry-out.</description>
        <input id="carry_out">Carry-out signal.</input>
        <input id="sr" width_description="[15:0]">Shift register.</input>
        <input id="neg_divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Negated divisor.</input>
        <output id="selected_result" width_description="[15:0]">Selected result.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="counting_process">
        <description>Counting process for the division operation.</description>
        <input id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter.</input>
        <input id="start_cnt">Start counting flag.</input>
        <output id="new_cnt" width_description="[3:0]">New counter value.</output>
    </task>
    <task id="result_valid_management">
        <description>Manage the validity of the result.</description>
        <input id="res_valid">Result validity flag.</input>
        <input id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">Result ready flag.</input>
        <output id="new_res_valid">New result validity flag.</output>
    </task>
</module>
